caption: In a podcast studio setting, a man wearing a white button-down shirt, beige suspenders, a red bow tie, and glasses speaks into a black microphone. He sports a distinctive, tall, silver-grey hairstyle and wears over-ear headphones. Behind him, a woman with bright pink hair, dressed in a green garment, stands observing. The background features black panels with the word "UNIQUE" and a framed logo depicting a yellow shield. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "#BOSS TALK PODCAST" on the left and the text "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man is seen gesturing with his right hand and speaking, while the woman remains relatively still in the background. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man's mid-torso and head as he engages in conversation.
